lightHit: Note the point — small, but it follows.
heavyHit: And from that premise: {evidence}. The conclusion is closing in on you.
You accepted the premise. This is what it entails.
combo: One: {stanceFor}. Two: {evidence}. Three: therefore — and you have no move left.
Each step granted, each step followed. That was a proof, not a punch.
special: THE SYLLOGISM. Major premise, minor premise — {topic}? Conclusion: inescapable.
All that remains is the conclusion. It arrives... now.
whiff: Hm. A lemma out of order.
blocked: Anticipated. Your objection was in my notes.
Blocked — as any valid argument survives a denial.
counter: There. {opponent} asserts without warrant — and the rebuttal writes itself.
That was a contradiction. Allow me to point at it, forcefully.
victory: Q.E.D. On the matter of {topic}, the argument stands.
defeat: The conclusion is... unsound. Somewhere a premise betrayed me.
Noted. I will be revising the argument.

special: THE SYLLOGISM — and on {topic}, of all questions? You brought a paradox to a proof fight.
